blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 735 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
